issues.description: Card has two distinct effects in text but DSL effects array is empty. Missing: (1) static ability preventing attacks, (2) triggered ability that negates this Character's effect when a card is trashed from hand by an effect during the turn.
Missing static effect: This Character cannot attack. Should be represented as a passive restriction.
Missing triggered effect: OnPlay trigger or passive monitoring for cards trashed from hand by effects. When condition met, should negate this Character's effect with duration DuringYourTurn.

effects.description: When a card is trashed from your hand by an effect, this Character's effect is negated during this turn
